strings.value: CheckUserName called  with password رمز الدخول غير صحيح
where a.no_mstlm IN(SELECT no_mstlm  FROM  USER_MNATK where nvl(sdad,0)>0 and NOU=
and a.no_mstlm IN(SELECT no_mstlm  FROM  USER_MNATK where nvl(sdad,0)>0 and NOU=

SELECT a.noa, a.no_tblh, a.no_mstlm, a.no_adad, a.nog, a.tel, a.namea,namem,nameg,
          SUM(NVL(d.mdin, 0) - NVL(d.dan, 0)) as balance from ((data_acc a LEFT JOIN data_d d ON d.noa = a.noa) inner join mkb2 on mkb2.NOM=a.no_mstlm) inner join grp on grp.nog=a.no_tblh
GROUP BY a.noa, a.namea, a.no_tblh, a.no_mstlm, a.no_adad, a.nog, a.tel,namem,nameg  order by NAMEA
select * from USER_R  order by NAME_U
select * from Mkb2 where NOM in(select no_mstlm from USER_MNATK
select NOU,no_mstlm,nvl(RED,0),nvl(SDAD,0),NAMEM from USER_MNATK inner join Mkb2 on Mkb2.NOM=USER_MNATK.no_mstlm
where red.no_mstlm IN(SELECT no_mstlm  FROM  USER_MNATK where nvl(red,0)>0 and NOU=
and red.no_mstlm IN(SELECT no_mstlm  FROM  USER_MNATK where nvl(red,0)>0 and NOU=

SELECT red.no_adad,red.no_mstlm,red.NAMET, red.no_tblh, red.NAMEA, red.NOA, red.ks, red.kh,red.NOG, red.IND,nvl(red.hn,0) as hn,nvl(sk,0) as sk,nvl(ASTS,0) as ASTS,nvl(MT,0) as MT,nvl(KMSN,0) as KMSN,nvl(matm33,0) as matm33,nvl(RTRDN,0) as RTRDN     FROM red
SELECT NOA,NAMEA,NVL(MDIN,0) as MDIN,NVL(DAN,0) as DAN,(select SUM(NVL(ds.mdin, 0) - NVL(ds.dan, 0))  from data_s ds
and ds.noa=DATA_s.noa) as balance from DATA_S
SELECT NAMEA,typems,NOMS,memos,NVL(amount,0) as amount  from data_H
SELECT NAMEA,typems,NOMS,memos,NVL(amount,0) as amount  from DATA_M

SELECT SNDK_A.no_box,sum(NVL( SNDK_A.amount,0)*SNDK_A.SARSF) as amount,count(*) as count,1 as type, SNDK_A.DATES, USER_R.NAME_U AS name_s,'محلي' as currencyname,1 as currencyid FROM(SNDK_A INNER JOIN USER_R  ON SNDK_A.no_box = USER_R.NOA)

group by SNDK_A.no_box,SNDK_A.DATES, USER_R.NAME_U   UNION SELECT SNDS_A.no_box,sum(NVL( SNDS_A.amount,0)*SNDS_A.SARSF) as amount,count(*) as count,2 as type, SNDS_A.DATES, USER_R.NAME_U AS name_s,'محلي' as currencyname,1 as currencyid FROM(SNDS_A INNER JOIN USER_R  ON SNDS_A.no_box = USER_R.NOA)
group by SNDS_A.no_box,SNDS_A.DATES, USER_R.NAME_U  order by DATES

SELECT SNDK_A.no_box,SNDK_A.NOAML,sum(NVL( SNDK_A.amount,0)),count(*) as count,1 as type, SNDK_A.DATES, USER_R.NAME_U AS name_s,amlh.namem as currencyname,amlh.no as currencyid FROM(SNDK_A INNER JOIN USER_R  ON SNDK_A.no_box = USER_R.NOA) INNER JOIN amlh ON SNDK_A.NOAML = amlh.no

group by SNDK_A.no_box,SNDK_A.NOAML,SNDK_A.DATES, USER_R.NAME_U,amlh.namem  UNION SELECT SNDS_A.no_box,SNDS_A.NOAML,sum(NVL( SNDS_A.amount,0)),count(*) as count,2 as type, SNDS_A.DATES, USER_R.NAME_U AS name_s,amlh.namem as currencyname,amlh.no as currencyid FROM(SNDS_A INNER JOIN USER_R  ON SNDS_A.no_box = USER_R.NOA) INNER JOIN amlh ON SNDS_A.NOAML = amlh.no
group by SNDS_A.no_box,SNDS_A.NOAML,SNDS_A.DATES, USER_R.NAME_U,amlh.namem  order by DATES,NOAML
group by SNDK_A.no_box,SNDK_A.DATES, USER_R.NAME_U   order by SNDK_A.DATES
group by SNDK_A.no_box,SNDK_A.NOAML,SNDK_A.DATES, USER_R.NAME_U,amlh.namem    order by SNDK_A.DATES,SNDK_A.NOAML

SELECT SNDK_A.NOAML,SNDK_A.SARSF, SNDK_A.stat, SNDK_A.NOS, SNDK_A.NOA, SNDK_A.amount, SNDK_A.DATES,SNDK_A.BIN, SNDK_A.MEMO,SNDK_A.MEMO_BOX, SNDK_A.no_box, data_acc.NAMEA, USER_R.NAME_U AS name_s,data_acc.no_tblh,data_acc.no_adad,data_acc.no_mstlm,data_acc.NOG,data_acc.tel,amlh.namem as currencyname,amlh.no as currencyid,1 as type FROM((SNDK_A INNER JOIN data_acc ON SNDK_A.NOA = data_acc.NOA) INNER JOIN USER_R  ON SNDK_A.no_box = USER_R.NOA) LEFT JOIN amlh ON SNDK_A.NOAML = amlh.no
where data_acc.no_mstlm IN(SELECT no_mstlm  FROM  USER_MNATK where nvl(sdad,0)>0 and NOU=
and data_acc.no_mstlm IN(SELECT no_mstlm  FROM  USER_MNATK where nvl(sdad,0)>0 and NOU=

SELECT SNDS_A.NOAML,SNDS_A.SARSF, SNDS_A.stat, SNDS_A.NOS, SNDS_A.NOA, SNDS_A.amount, SNDS_A.DATES,SNDS_A.BIN, SNDS_A.MEMO,SNDS_A.MEMO_BOX, SNDS_A.no_box, data_acc.NAMEA, USER_R.NAME_U AS name_s,amlh.namem as currencyname,amlh.no as currencyid,data_acc.typea as type FROM((SNDS_A INNER JOIN data_acc ON SNDS_A.NOA = data_acc.NOA) INNER JOIN USER_R  ON SNDS_A.no_box = USER_R.NOA) INNER JOIN amlh ON SNDS_A.NOAML = amlh.no
select  NOAML,SARSRF,NOMS,DATES,TYPEMS,NOA,NVL(MDIN,0) as mden,NVL(DAN,0) as dain,(NVL(MDIN,0)-NVL(DAN,0)) as balance,MDINAML,DANAML,MEMOS from DATA_D  where NOA=
select  NOAML,SARSRF,NOMS,DATES,TYPEMS,NOA,MDIN,DAN,NVL(MDINAML,0) as mden,NVL(DANAML,0) as dain,(NVL(MDINAML,0)-NVL(DANAML,0)) as balance,MEMOS from DATA_D  where NOA=
select DATA_D.NOA,sum(NVL(DATA_D.MDIN,0)-NVL(DATA_D.DAN,0)) as balance,max(DATA_D.DATES) as mdate from DATA_D
select DATA_D.NOA,sum(NVL(DATA_D.MDINAML,0)-NVL(DATA_D.DANAML,0)) as balance,max(DATA_D.DATES) as mdate from DATA_D

select DATA_D.NOA,data_acc.NAMEA,sum(NVL(DATA_D.MDIN,0)) as mden,sum(NVL(DATA_D.DAN,0)) as dain,sum(NVL(DATA_D.MDIN,0)-NVL(DATA_D.DAN,0)) as balance,max(DATA_D.DATES) as mdate from DATA_D inner join data_acc on  DATA_D.NOA=data_acc.NOA
group by DATA_D.NOA,data_acc.NAMEA  HAVING sum(NVL(DATA_D.MDIN,0)-NVL(DATA_D.DAN,0)) !=0   order by data_acc.NAMEA

select DATA_D.NOA,data_acc.NAMEA,sum(NVL(DATA_D.MDINAML,0)) as mden,sum(NVL(DATA_D.DANAML,0)) as dain,sum(NVL(DATA_D.MDINAML,0)-NVL(DATA_D.DANAML,0)) as balance,max(DATA_D.DATES) as mdate from DATA_D inner join data_acc on  DATA_D.NOA=data_acc.NOA
group by DATA_D.NOA,data_acc.NAMEA HAVING sum(NVL(DATA_D.MDINAML,0)-NVL(DATA_D.DANAML,0)) !=0  order by data_acc.NAMEA

select amlh.NO,amlh.namem,sum(NVL(DATA_D.MDIN,0)-NVL(DATA_D.DAN,0)) as balance,sum(NVL(DATA_D.MDINAML,0)-NVL(DATA_D.DANAML,0)) as balancelocal,max(DATA_D.DATES) as mdate from DATA_D inner join amlh on  DATA_D.NOAML=amlh.no where DATA_D.NOA=
group by DATA_D.NOA,amlh.namem,amlh.no HAVING sum(NVL(DATA_D.MDIN,0)-NVL(DATA_D.DAN,0)) !=0    order by amlh.no
